name: minecraft-codex-skills
description: A dual-target Minecraft development skills bundle for Codex and Claude Code, with built-in image-generation workflows on Codex.

interface.shortDescription: 13 reusable Minecraft development and operations skills, plus built-in image-generation workflows on Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle modding, plugin-dev, datapack, commands, testing, CI/CD, world generation, resource pack, server admin, WorldEdit ops, and EssentialsX ops skills in one installable package, with built-in image-generation workflows when running on Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Minecraft Codex Skills to scaffold a NeoForge 1.21.11 mod with data generation.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to generate pack art or concept textures for a resource-pack update.
